mapper.insert: insert into ${prefix}ACT_HI_VAR_TRACE (ID_, TRACE_ID_, SEQ_, TIME_STAMP_, OPERATION_TYPE_, VAR_NAME_, VAR_TYPE_, VALUE_TEXT_, TRANSIENT_, ELEMENT_ID_, SCOPE_ID_, SCOPE_TYPE_, DEF_ID_, VAR_SCOPE_ID_, VAR_SCOPE_TYPE_, MAPPING_ID_) values ( #{id, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{traceId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{sequence, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{timestamp, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{variableName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{variableType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{valueText, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{transientVariable, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{elementId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{scopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{scopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{definitionId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{variableScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{variableScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mappingId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} )

insert into ${prefix}ACT_HI_VAR_TRACE (ID_, TRACE_ID_, SEQ_, TIME_STAMP_, OPERATION_TYPE_, VAR_NAME_, VAR_TYPE_, VALUE_TEXT_, TRANSIENT_, ELEMENT_ID_, SCOPE_ID_, SCOPE_TYPE_, DEF_ID_, VAR_SCOPE_ID_, VAR_SCOPE_TYPE_, MAPPING_ID_) values
(#{entry.id, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.traceId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.sequence, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entry.timestamp, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entry.operationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.variableName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.variableType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.valueText, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.transientVariable, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{entry.elementId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.scopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.scopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.definitionId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.variableScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.variableScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.mappingId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

INSERT ALL
INTO ${prefix}ACT_HI_VAR_TRACE (ID_, TRACE_ID_, SEQ_, TIME_STAMP_, OPERATION_TYPE_, VAR_NAME_, VAR_TYPE_, VALUE_TEXT_, TRANSIENT_, ELEMENT_ID_, SCOPE_ID_, SCOPE_TYPE_, DEF_ID_, VAR_SCOPE_ID_, VAR_SCOPE_TYPE_, MAPPING_ID_) VALUES (#{entry.id, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.traceId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.sequence, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entry.timestamp, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entry.operationType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.variableName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.variableType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.valueText, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.transientVariable, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{entry.elementId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.scopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.scopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.definitionId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.variableScopeId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{entry.variableScopeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entry.mappingId, jdbcType=NVARCHAR})
SELECT * FROM dual
